title: Factory Spec Frontmatter
description: Frontmatter schema for human-authored specs at specs/<id>.md (per the spec_artifact_model decision). Specs are the sole human authoring surface; factory translates each spec 1:1 into an intent at run time. The body of the markdown file is the authoritative content read by the planner; this schema covers only the metadata in the frontmatter block.

id.description: Kebab-case unique identifier. Must match the filename (without .md).

title.description: One-line summary. Surfaced in status output and audit logs.

depends_on.description: Other spec ids that must complete before this spec runs. Optional; defaults to []. Cycles are rejected at validation time.
